---
title: "04_GSEA_CrossModule_Comparison"
output: html_document
date: "2026-03-25"
---

## 0. Libraries and paths

```{r setup}

library(dplyr)
library(tibble)
library(tidyr)
library(ggplot2)
library(pheatmap)
library(RColorBrewer)
library(purrr)

# ── Paths ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
database_dir <- "/home/jose/Desktop/RNAseq/results/Enrichment/GSEA_inputs/Reports/REACTOME/"
out_dir   <- "/home/jose/Desktop/RNAseq/results/Enrichment/GSEA_inputs/Reports/CrossModules/REACTOME/M3"
plot_dir  <- "/home/jose/Desktop/RNAseq/results/plots/Enrichment/KEGG"

dir.create(out_dir,  recursive = TRUE, showWarnings = FALSE)
dir.create(plot_dir, recursive = TRUE, showWarnings = FALSE)

# ── Significance thresholds ──────────────────────────────────────────────────
FDR_SIG        <- 0.05   # Significant
FDR_BORDERLINE <- 0.25   # Borderline — consistent signal worth noting
# > 0.40 = ns

```

---

## 1. Modular loading functions

```{r load_functions}

# Null-coalescing operator
`%||%` <- function(a, b) if (!is.null(a)) a else b

# ── Read one GSEA TSV file ────────────────────────────────────────────────────
read_gsea_tsv <- function(path) {
  if (is.null(path) || !file.exists(path)) return(NULL)

  df <- tryCatch(
    read.delim(path, stringsAsFactors = FALSE, check.names = FALSE),
    error = function(e) { message("Read error: ", path); return(NULL) }
  )
  if (is.null(df)) return(NULL)

  colnames(df) <- toupper(trimws(colnames(df)))

  # Normalise FDR column name across GSEA versions
  if (!"FDR Q-VAL" %in% colnames(df) && "FDR.Q.VAL" %in% colnames(df))
    colnames(df)[colnames(df) == "FDR.Q.VAL"] <- "FDR Q-VAL"

  needed <- c("NAME", "NES", "FDR Q-VAL")
  if (!all(needed %in% colnames(df))) {
    warning("Missing columns in ", basename(path), ": ",
            paste(setdiff(needed, colnames(df)), collapse = ", "))
    return(NULL)
  }

  df %>%
    select(NAME, NES, `FDR Q-VAL`) %>%
    rename(pathway = NAME, NES = NES, FDR = `FDR Q-VAL`) %>%
    filter(!is.na(NES))
}

# ── Load pos + neg TSVs for one GSEA run ─────────────────────────────────────
# Files follow pattern: <label>_gsea_report_for_na_pos_<timestamp>.tsv
load_gsea_result <- function(root, label) {

  all_files <- list.files(root, pattern = "\\.tsv$",
                          full.names = TRUE, ignore.case = TRUE)
  label_esc <- gsub("\\.", "\\\\.", label)

  pick_latest <- function(files) {
    if (length(files) == 0) return(NULL)
    files[which.max(file.mtime(files))]
  }

  pos_file <- pick_latest(
    all_files[grepl(paste0("^", label_esc, "_gsea_report_for_na_pos"),
                    basename(all_files))]
  )
  neg_file <- pick_latest(
    all_files[grepl(paste0("^", label_esc, "_gsea_report_for_na_neg"),
                    basename(all_files))]
  )

  pos <- read_gsea_tsv(pos_file)
  neg <- read_gsea_tsv(neg_file)

  result <- bind_rows(pos, neg)
  if (nrow(result) == 0) {
    message("No results for: ", label); return(NULL)
  }

  message("Loaded: ", label,
          "  pos=", nrow(pos %||% data.frame()),
          " / neg=", nrow(neg %||% data.frame()))
  result
}

# ── Annotate significance tier for one result dataframe ──────────────────────
# Adds: sig_tier (sig / borderline / ns), direction (up / down / ns)
annotate_significance <- function(gsea_df) {
  if (is.null(gsea_df)) return(NULL)
  gsea_df %>%
    mutate(
      sig_tier = case_when(
        FDR <= FDR_SIG        ~ "sig",
        FDR <= FDR_BORDERLINE ~ "borderline",
        TRUE                  ~ "ns"
      ),
      direction = case_when(
        FDR <= FDR_SIG & NES > 0 ~ "up",
        FDR <= FDR_SIG & NES < 0 ~ "down",
        TRUE                     ~ "ns"
      )
    )
}

```

---

## 2. Load all GSEA results

```{r load_all}

labels <- list(
  M3_TEA_vs_TOC        = "M3_TEA_vs_TOC_REACTOME",
  M3_TEA_vs_Tourette        = "M3_TEA_vs_Tourette_REACTOME",
  M3_TOC_vs_Tourette   = "M3_TOC_vs_Tourette_REACTOME"
)

# Load and annotate all results
gsea_results <- lapply(labels, function(lbl) {
  res <- load_gsea_result(database_dir, lbl)
  annotate_significance(res)
})
names(gsea_results) <- names(labels)

loaded <- !sapply(gsea_results, is.null)
message("\nLoaded: ", sum(loaded), "/", length(loaded))
if (any(!loaded))
  message("Missing: ", paste(names(loaded)[!loaded], collapse = ", "))

# Universe of all pathways tested across all runs
all_pathways <- unique(unlist(lapply(gsea_results, function(x) x$pathway)))
message("Total unique pathways: ", length(all_pathways))

```

---

## 3. Build master table — full information retention

```{r master_table}

# ── For each module, create a per-pathway dataframe with NES, FDR, sig_tier ──
# Pathways not tested in a given module get NA (not "ns") for NES and FDR
# and "not_tested" for sig_tier and direction
build_module_columns <- function(gsea_df, mod_name, all_pathways) {

  base <- data.frame(pathway = all_pathways, stringsAsFactors = FALSE)

  if (is.null(gsea_df)) {
    base[[paste0(mod_name, "_NES")]]      <- NA_real_
    base[[paste0(mod_name, "_FDR")]]      <- NA_real_
    base[[paste0(mod_name, "_sig")]]      <- "not_tested"
    base[[paste0(mod_name, "_direction")]] <- "not_tested"
    return(base)
  }

  merged <- base %>%
    left_join(
      gsea_df %>% select(pathway, NES, FDR, sig_tier, direction),
      by = "pathway"
    ) %>%
    rename(
      !!paste0(mod_name, "_NES")       := NES,
      !!paste0(mod_name, "_FDR")       := FDR,
      !!paste0(mod_name, "_sig")       := sig_tier,
      !!paste0(mod_name, "_direction") := direction
    ) %>%
    mutate(
      # Pathways tested but not significant are "ns", not "not_tested"
      !!paste0(mod_name, "_sig") :=
        ifelse(is.na(.data[[paste0(mod_name, "_sig")]]),
               "not_tested",
               .data[[paste0(mod_name, "_sig")]]),
      !!paste0(mod_name, "_direction") :=
        ifelse(is.na(.data[[paste0(mod_name, "_direction")]]),
               "not_tested",
               .data[[paste0(mod_name, "_direction")]])
    )
  merged
}

# Build and merge all modules
module_dfs <- lapply(names(gsea_results), function(mod) {
  build_module_columns(gsea_results[[mod]], mod, all_pathways)
})

master <- reduce(module_dfs, left_join, by = "pathway")

message("Master table built: ", nrow(master), " pathways x ",
        ncol(master), " columns")

```

---

## 4. Consistency metrics between M2 diagnoses

```{r consistency_metrics}

nes_m3_cols <- c("M3_TEA_vs_TOC_NES", "M3_TEA_vs_Tourette_NES", "M3_TOC_vs_Tourette_NES")
dir_m3_cols <- c("M3_TEA_vs_TOC_direction", "M3_TEA_vs_Tourette_direction", "M3_TOC_vs_Tourette_direction")
sig_m3_cols <- c("M3_TEA_vs_TOC_sig", "M3_TEA_vs_Tourette_sig", "M3_TOC_vs_Tourette_sig")

master <- master %>%
  mutate(

    # ── How many M2 diagnoses are significant? ────────────────────────────────
    M3_n_sig = rowSums(across(all_of(sig_m3_cols), ~ . == "sig")),
    M3_n_borderline = rowSums(across(all_of(sig_m3_cols), ~ . == "borderline")),
    M3_n_tested = rowSums(across(all_of(sig_m3_cols), ~ . != "not_tested")),

    # ── Direction concordance ─────────────────────────────────────────────────
    # Among tested diagnoses, are directions consistent?
    M2_directions_tested = pmap_chr(
      list(M2_TEA_direction, M2_TOC_direction, M2_Tourette_direction),
      function(a, b, c) {
        dirs <- unique(c(a, b, c)[c(a, b, c) != "not_tested"])
        if (length(dirs) == 0) return("not_tested")
        if (length(dirs) == 1) return(dirs)
        return("mixed")
      }
    ),

    # ── Rich M2 category ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────
    M2_category = case_when(

      # All 3 significant, same direction
      M2_n_sig == 3 & M2_directions_tested == "up"   ~ "Shared_all_up",
      M2_n_sig == 3 & M2_directions_tested == "down" ~ "Shared_all_down",
      M2_n_sig == 3 & M2_directions_tested == "mixed" ~ "Shared_all_divergent",

      # 2 of 3 significant, consistent direction
      M2_n_sig == 2 &
        M2_TEA_sig == "sig" & M2_TOC_sig == "sig" &
        M2_TEA_direction == M2_TOC_direction         ~ "Shared_TEA_TOC",
      M2_n_sig == 2 &
        M2_TEA_sig == "sig" & M2_Tourette_sig == "sig" &
        M2_TEA_direction == M2_Tourette_direction    ~ "Shared_TEA_Tourette",
      M2_n_sig == 2 &
        M2_TOC_sig == "sig" & M2_Tourette_sig == "sig" &
        M2_TOC_direction == M2_Tourette_direction    ~ "Shared_TOC_Tourette",

      # 2 of 3 significant but divergent directions
      M2_n_sig == 2                                  ~ "Shared_2_divergent",

      # Exactly 1 significant
      M2_n_sig == 1 & M2_TEA_sig == "sig"            ~ "Specific_TEA",
      M2_n_sig == 1 & M2_TOC_sig == "sig"            ~ "Specific_TOC",
      M2_n_sig == 1 & M2_Tourette_sig == "sig"       ~ "Specific_Tourette",

      # None significant but borderline in >=2
      M2_n_sig == 0 & M2_n_borderline >= 2 &
        M2_directions_tested != "mixed"              ~ "Borderline_consistent",

      # None significant, borderline in 1
      M2_n_sig == 0 & M2_n_borderline == 1           ~ "Borderline_1",

      # Nothing
      TRUE                                           ~ "Not_enriched"
    ))

message("M2 category distribution:")
print(table(master$M2_category))

```

---

## 5. Generate output tables

```{r output_tables}

# ── Save master table ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

tableM <- master %>%
  select(pathway, M2_category, 
         M2_TEA_NES, M2_TOC_NES, M2_Tourette_NES, 
         M2_TEA_FDR, M2_TOC_FDR, M2_Tourette_FDR,
         M2_TEA_sig, M2_TOC_sig, M2_Tourette_sig,
         M2_TEA_direction, M2_TOC_direction, M2_Tourette_direction, 
         M2_directions_tested)

write.csv(tableM, file = file.path(out_dir, "Table_KEGG_comparison.csv"),
          row.names = FALSE)
message("Table KEGG saved: ", nrow(master), " pathways")

```

---

## 6. Visualizations

### 6a. NES heatmap with significance overlay

```{r heatmap_nes_sig}

# ── M2 NES heatmap with significance asterisks ───────────────────────────────
nes_cols <- c("M2_TEA_NES", "M2_TOC_NES", "M2_Tourette_NES")
sig_cols <- c("M2_TEA_sig", "M2_TOC_sig", "M2_Tourette_sig")

# Include all pathways tested in at least one M2 diagnosis
nes_m2 <- master %>%
  filter(M2_n_tested >= 1) %>%
  select(pathway, M2_category, all_of(nes_cols)) %>%
  column_to_rownames("pathway")

# Build significance label matrix for display
sig_m2_mat <- master %>%
  filter(M2_n_tested >= 1) %>%
  select(pathway, all_of(sig_cols)) %>%
  column_to_rownames("pathway") %>%
  mutate(across(everything(), ~ case_when(
    . == "sig"        ~ "*",
    . == "borderline" ~ "·",
    TRUE              ~ ""
  )))

ann_row <- master %>%
  filter(M2_n_tested >= 1) %>%
  select(pathway, M2_category) %>%
  column_to_rownames("pathway")

nes_mat <- nes_m2 %>% select(all_of(nes_cols))
colnames(nes_mat) <- c("TEA", "TOC", "Tourette")
nes_mat[is.na(nes_mat)] <- 0
colnames(sig_m2_mat) <- c("TEA", "TOC", "Tourette")

# Sort by mean NES
nes_mat <- nes_mat[order(rowMeans(nes_mat, na.rm = TRUE), decreasing = TRUE), ]
sig_m2_mat <- sig_m2_mat[rownames(nes_mat), ]

# Clean names
rownames(nes_mat)     <- gsub("HALLMARK_|_", " ", rownames(nes_mat))
rownames(sig_m2_mat)  <- rownames(nes_mat)
rownames(ann_row)     <- gsub("HALLMARK_|_", " ", rownames(ann_row))

png(file.path(plot_dir, "Fig1_M2_NES_heatmap_with_significance.png"),
    width = 10, height = max(6, nrow(nes_mat) * 0.38 + 2),
    units = "in", res = 300)

pheatmap(
  nes_mat,
  display_numbers = sig_m2_mat,
  number_color    = "black",
  fontsize_number = 10,
  color           = colorRampPalette(c("#4e9af1", "white", "#e05c5c"))(100),
  breaks          = seq(-3, 3, length.out = 101),
  cluster_rows    = TRUE,
  cluster_cols    = FALSE,
  annotation_row  = ann_row,
  annotation_colors = list(
    M2_category = c(
      Shared_all_up        = "#c0392b",
      Shared_all_down      = "#2980b9",
      Shared_all_divergent = "#f39c12",
      Shared_TEA_TOC       = "#e67e22",
      Shared_TEA_Tourette  = "#8e44ad",
      Shared_TOC_Tourette  = "#27ae60",
      Shared_2_divergent   = "#d35400",
      Specific_TEA         = "#9b59b6",
      Specific_TOC         = "#2ecc71",
      Specific_Tourette    = "#1abc9c",
      Borderline_consistent = "#95a5a6",
      Borderline_1         = "#bdc3c7",
      Not_enriched         = "#ecf0f1"
    )
  ),
  fontsize_row  = 8,
  fontsize_col  = 12,
  border_color  = NA,
  main          = "GSEA Hallmark — M2 NES (LPS vs Basal)\n* = FDR≤0.25  · = FDR≤0.40"
)

dev.off()
message("Fig1 saved.")

```

### 6b. Bubble plot: NES vs -log10(FDR) per diagnosis

```{r bubble_plot}

# Reshape M2 results to long format for plotting
bubble_df <- master %>%
  filter(M2_n_tested >= 1) %>%
  select(pathway, M2_category,
         M2_TEA_NES, M2_TEA_FDR,
         M2_TOC_NES, M2_TOC_FDR,
         M2_Tourette_NES, M2_Tourette_FDR) %>%
  pivot_longer(
    cols = -c(pathway, M2_category),
    names_to = c("diagnosis", ".value"),
    names_pattern = "M2_(.+)_(NES|FDR)"
  ) %>%
  filter(!is.na(NES), !is.na(FDR)) %>%
  mutate(
    log10FDR   = -log10(FDR + 1e-10),
    sig_label  = case_when(
      FDR <= FDR_SIG        ~ "Significant",
      FDR <= FDR_BORDERLINE ~ "Borderline",
      TRUE                  ~ "NS"
    ),
    pathway_clean = gsub("HALLMARK_|_", " ", pathway)
  )

p_bubble <- ggplot(bubble_df,
                   aes(x = NES, y = log10FDR,
                       color = diagnosis, shape = sig_label,
                       size  = abs(NES))) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = -log10(FDR_SIG),        linetype = "dashed",
             color = "grey40", linewidth = 0.5) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = -log10(FDR_BORDERLINE), linetype = "dotted",
             color = "grey60", linewidth = 0.4) +
  geom_vline(xintercept = 0, color = "grey40", linewidth = 0.4) +
  geom_point(alpha = 0.75) +
  scale_color_manual(values = c("TEA"     = "#9b59b6",
                                 "TOC"     = "#2ecc71",
                                 "Tourette" = "#e05c5c")) +
  scale_shape_manual(values = c("Significant" = 16,
                                 "Borderline"  = 17,
                                 "NS"          = 1)) +
  scale_size_continuous(range = c(2, 6), guide = "none") +
  facet_wrap(~ diagnosis, ncol = 3) +
  labs(title    = "GSEA Hallmark — NES vs significance per diagnosis",
       subtitle = "Dashed = FDR 0.25  |  Dotted = FDR 0.40",
       x = "Normalized Enrichment Score (NES)",
       y = "-log10(FDR)",
       color = "Diagnosis", shape = "Significance") +
  theme_bw(base_size = 12) +
  theme(plot.title    = element_text(face = "bold"),
        strip.text    = element_text(face = "bold"),
        legend.position = "bottom")

ggsave(file.path(plot_dir, "Fig2_bubble_NES_FDR.png"),
       p_bubble, width = 14, height = 6, dpi = 300)
message("Fig2 saved.")

```

### 6c. Scatter: NES TEA vs TOC vs Tourette pairwise

```{r scatter_nes}

make_scatter <- function(df, x_diag, y_diag, x_col, y_col,
                         fdr_x, fdr_y) {

  df_plot <- df %>%
    dplyr::filter(!is.na(.data[[x_col]]), !is.na(.data[[y_col]])) %>%
    dplyr::mutate(
      sig_both = .data[[fdr_x]] <= FDR_SIG & .data[[fdr_y]] <= FDR_SIG,
      sig_x    = .data[[fdr_x]] <= FDR_SIG & .data[[fdr_y]] > FDR_SIG,
      sig_y    = .data[[fdr_y]] <= FDR_SIG & .data[[fdr_x]] > FDR_SIG,

      point_color = dplyr::case_when(
        sig_both ~ "Both significant",
        sig_x    ~ paste0(x_diag, " only"),
        sig_y    ~ paste0(y_diag, " only"),
        TRUE     ~ "NS"
      ),

      pathway_clean = gsub("HALLMARK_|_", " ", pathway)
    )

  cor_val <- cor(df_plot[[x_col]], df_plot[[y_col]], use = "complete.obs")

  # ---- FIXED COLOR VECTOR (no paste0 inside c()) ----
  color_map <- c(
    "Both significant" = "#c0392b",
    "NS"               = "grey70"
  )

  color_map[paste0(x_diag, " only")] <- "#9b59b6"
  color_map[paste0(y_diag, " only")] <- "#2ecc71"

  ggplot(df_plot, aes(x = .data[[x_col]],
                      y = .data[[y_col]],
                      color = point_color)) +

    geom_abline(slope = 1, intercept = 0, linetype = "dashed",
                color = "grey50") +
    geom_hline(yintercept = 0, color = "grey70", linewidth = 0.3) +
    geom_vline(xintercept = 0, color = "grey70", linewidth = 0.3) +
    geom_point(size = 3, alpha = 0.8) +

    ggrepel::geom_text_repel(
      data = df_plot %>% dplyr::filter(sig_both | sig_x | sig_y),
      aes(label = pathway_clean),
      size = 2.5, max.overlaps = 15
    ) +

    scale_color_manual(values = color_map) +

    annotate("text", x = -Inf, y = Inf,
             label = paste0("r = ", round(cor_val, 2)),
             hjust = -0.2, vjust = 1.5,
             size = 4, fontface = "italic") +

    labs(
      title    = paste("NES comparison:", x_diag, "vs", y_diag),
      subtitle = "Diagonal = perfect concordance",
      x        = paste("NES", x_diag),
      y        = paste("NES", y_diag),
      color    = "Significance"
    ) +

    theme_bw(base_size = 12) +
    theme(
      plot.title = element_text(face = "bold"),
      legend.position = "bottom"
    )
}

# Install ggrepel if needed: install.packages("ggrepel")
library(ggrepel)

p_tea_toc <- make_scatter(
  master, "TEA", "TOC",
  "M2_TEA_NES", "M2_TOC_NES",
  "M2_TEA_FDR", "M2_TOC_FDR"
)
p_tea_ts <- make_scatter(
  master, "TEA", "Tourette",
  "M2_TEA_NES", "M2_Tourette_NES",
  "M2_TEA_FDR", "M2_Tourette_FDR"
)
p_toc_ts <- make_scatter(
  master, "TOC", "Tourette",
  "M2_TOC_NES", "M2_Tourette_NES",
  "M2_TOC_FDR", "M2_Tourette_FDR"
)

ggsave(file.path(plot_dir, "Fig3a_scatter_TEA_vs_TOC.png"),
       p_tea_toc, width = 7, height = 6, dpi = 300)
ggsave(file.path(plot_dir, "Fig3b_scatter_TEA_vs_Tourette.png"),
       p_tea_ts, width = 7, height = 6, dpi = 300)
ggsave(file.path(plot_dir, "Fig3c_scatter_TOC_vs_Tourette.png"),
       p_toc_ts, width = 7, height = 6, dpi = 300)
message("Fig3 scatter plots saved.")

```
